name: name-tools
description: A utility library for parsing, formatting, and manipulating person names

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts && tsup src/docs-entry.ts --format esm --outDir docs --no-dts && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('docs/name-tools.js'))fs.unlinkSync('docs/name-tools.js'); fs.renameSync('docs/docs-entry.mjs', 'docs/name-tools.js'); fs.copyFileSync('src/data/examples.json', 'docs/examples.json')"

author: Bob Pritchett
